description: CompositionGreen round neck half sleeve t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest printWash care1. Light machine wash2. Do not bleach 3. Warm iron on reverse 4. Do not dry clean 5. Dry flat/reverse 6. Do not scrubFittingComfort FitHit the ranch this summer in this fresh green t-shirt from lee. Designed with a classic old sketch print of the cowboy, this tee is perfect for a day with horses among tall grass, while the cotton fabric keeps you cool and dry. Team it with denims or chinos and pair it with stylish footwear from the wide collection available at myntra to don that perfect look for brunches at the club or casual outings.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-19"
